stemHtml: What is the principle of operation of the Synthetic Vision System (SVS)?

options.a: It is based on a terrain and ground features database that are shown on the PFD to increase the pilot’s situational awareness.
options.b: It is based on infrared sensors detecting the surrounding terrain and replicating it on the PFD to increase the pilot’s situational awareness.
options.c: The SVS is another term for the HUD.
options.d: The SVS principle is based on the same components as the PFD.
